235 CO_TRTMT_OT_WK_1_NUM CO_TRTMT_OT_WK_1_NUM O0401BD OT: Total Minutes Co-treatment Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of co-treatment occupational therapy minutes provided in the first week of stay.
